Package com.hp.workpath.api.webservices

Provides interfaces for retrieving Web services

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    AbstractWebServices.Callback
    Callback for abstract web services methods
    Callback
    Provides interface for callback
    Callback.HttpCallback
    Provides interface for http callback
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractWebServices
    Implementations of this class provide webservices for Workpath platform.
    HttpRequest
    Class for accessing HttpRequest.
    HttpResponse
    Class for accessing HttpResponse.
    WebServices
    Class for managing WebServices.
    WebServicesAttributes
    Class for building web service attributes.
    WebServicesAttributes.Builder
    Builder for creating an instance of WebServicesAttributes.
